madrat 3.35.1

Tool: withMadratLogging

Source: R/withMadratLogging.R
withMadratLogging.Rd

Function will activate madrat logging facilities for all code provided to this function. This means that message, warning and stop calls will also report to the madrat log output

Usage

withMadratLogging(expr, logOnly = TRUE)

Arguments

expr

expression to be evaluated.

logOnly

passed to vcat, determines if warning/error is thrown after logging

See also

vcat

Author

Jan Philipp Dietrich

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
madrat:::withMadratLogging(message("Hello world!"))
} # }

On this page

Developed by Jan Philipp Dietrich, Pascal Sauer, Lavinia Baumstark, Stephen Wirth, Anastasis Giannousakis, Renato Rodrigues, Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Debbora Leip, Michael Crawford, Ulrich Kreidenweis, David Klein, Patrick Rein.
